intent: Popover bubble for showing extra content or lightweight interactions near a trigger. Auto-closes on outside click.

blacklist.description: Do not override styles matching pattern ^(absolute|fixed|z-)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|border)-(popover|border)

aiPrompt: Use Popover from @/components/starter. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
